summary: Iteration 3 fully verified end-to-end. 13/13 backend pytest tests pass (35s). Frontend smoke covered Login (no default admin text + empty fields), AdminPrompts (3 seeded items, edit + save + provider/model dropdown), AdminUsers (per-row Role select + Reset password dialog with min-8 validation, no role-select for self), Layout Change-password button on admin sidebar AND worker header (both open dialog), AdminAttendance Last-N-days selector + Download PDF triggering valid %PDF blob.

issues: Dialog backdrop opacity is too low — underlying 'Generate product' card and category dropdown bleed through the modal making fields hard to read. Increase backdrop opacity / add stronger blur.

action_items: Optional: strengthen Dialog backdrop (DialogOverlay bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm) so worker change-password modal isn't visually transparent.
Optional: surface explicit toast on min-8 validation in ChangePasswordDialog — currently HTML5 minLength prevents submit silently when paired with required attr.

Optional: dedupe data-testid='change-password-btn' between sidebar & header (same id used twice). Querying returns 1 because only the visible layout is mounted at a time, but consider distinct testids (sidebar-change-password / header-change-password) for clarity.
critical_code_review_comments: Prompt template patch endpoint correctly drops None fields and gates on admin role; worker correctly receives 403 for both list (admin/manager only) and patch.
ai_service.generate_product_draft loads tpl from db each call — fine, but consider a small cache or single read per request for efficiency under load.
fuzz duplicate retry uses token_set_ratio with threshold 85 — tested 3 sequential generations: pairwise ratios all <85.
Timesheet PDF: Content-Type application/pdf, valid %PDF magic, Content-Disposition attachment; with filename works for days=7 and days=30.

admin_reset_password endpoint: no self-prevention or audit confirmation that an admin doesn't accidentally reset their OWN password through this path — minor (admin can also use /auth/change-password).
Layout uses identical data-testid='change-password-btn' for both sidebar (admin) and header (worker) — works because only one layout renders at a time, but creates ambiguity for tests.
test_credentials: Admin admin@gemsandluxury.com / Admin@123 ; Worker worker@gemsandluxury.com / Worker@123 (both restored after destructive password tests)
seed_data_creation: Test created 1 ephemeral 'TEST Role' user via admin/users (deactivated, role=manager at end). Generated 3 products via /products/generate during fuzzy duplicate verification. Patched product_draft prompt description (cosmetic).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 1, 2, 3 all green. Backend test files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (iter1), test_iteration2.py (iter2), test_iteration3.py (iter3, 13 tests). Run all: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<public> pytest backend/tests -v. Admin & worker passwords are restored to seed values; do not assume any other persistent password changes. Prompt templates collection seeded with 3 entries (product_draft / image_enhance / image_alternate); product_draft.description was modified during testing (non-functional). One TEST Role user (manager, inactive) lingers in users collection with TEST_ prefix — safe.
